description: One-time historical seed of the matrix from each candidate's own campaign platform/issues page. First-person, directly attributable. URLs researched + human-confirmed 2026-07-08. Only candidates with real housing content on a fetchable page are included; those with a live site but no published housing page (matthew-brewer, george-cardenas, lisa-nee) and those with no campaign site yet (maria-pappas) are deferred to later phases / media intake. danielle-carter-walters has a housing plank but her site 403s non-browser fetchers, so she is held back until ingest supports a browser user-agent.
